query:
-- Ver total de transações por origem
SELECT source, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN type='expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as total_despesas
FROM transactions 
GROUP BY source;

-- Ver transações que NÃO vieram do import_excel (foram importadas pela usuária via upload)
SELECT id, description, amount, dueDate, status, source, createdAt
FROM transactions 
WHERE source != 'import_excel' OR source IS NULL
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 30;
